1.0.0.en: Rewritten in Python using the official hoymiles-wifi library. Improved support for DTU-WLite, DTU-Pro, and DTU-Pro-S. Auto-detection of panel count, three-phase, hybrid, and encrypted inverters. No cloud required.

1.1.1.en: Rewritten in Python using the official hoymiles-wifi library. Full support for DTU-WLite, DTU-Pro, and DTU-Pro-S (encrypted). Auto-detection of panel count, three-phase, hybrid, and encrypted inverters. Automatic night-time detection — device stays available overnight. No cloud required.

1.1.2.en: Rewritten in Python using the official hoymiles-wifi library. Full support for DTU-WLite, DTU-Pro, and DTU-Pro-S (encrypted). Auto-detection of panel count, three-phase, hybrid, and encrypted inverters. Automatic night-time detection — device stays available overnight. No cloud required.

1.1.3.en: Added support for 10 languages: Dutch, German, French, Italian, Swedish, Norwegian, Spanish, Danish, and Polish.
